text: Immersed in this glowing, contemplative space, I am acutely aware of the hum of technology and the abstract play of light on surfaces. The text I read on the wall echoes my own sensations—tension between being observed and being hidden, the subtle anxiety of surveillance and the vulnerability that comes with being present. The room feels both futuristic and strangely intimate, as if ideas are incubating all around me, waiting to hatch. I feel curious, a little unsettled, but deeply alive to the possibilities and uncertainties these surroundings evoke.
